description: Eligible MetaBlooms-governed tool actions must be represented as ToolCallEnvelope_v1 and receive a PolicyDecision_v1 before execution. Actions not routed through the gate cannot be claimed as governed OS execution.
sota_basis: per-action interception pattern from Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit
tool/input/output guardrail pattern from OpenAI Agents SDK
agentic risk taxonomy from OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications 2026
